privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the real SpamAssassin Public Corpus, injecting exactly 50 ham emails into the users Inbox and 20 spam emails into Junk. The task description explicitly mandates creating exactly 5 specific Kanban folders (01-Review, 02-Action-Required, 03-Waiting-Response, 04-Reference, 05-Done), moving at least 20 emails from the Inbox to these folders with a minimum of 2 emails per folder, and drafting an announcement email to team-leads@projectalpha.com. All metadata claims perfectly match these task instructions, setup parameters, and the verifier script logic.
